triggers.auspicioushelper/FadeChannelTri.description: Fade between two channel values depending on player position in the trigger

placements.positionMode: hi! dm cloudsbelow the code tl8q_ and they will accept a (reasonable) feature request. Limit first person.
placements.onlyOnce: Remove this trigger after it is exited for the first time
placements.activeChannel: If specified, the trigger will do nothing if this channel is zero

triggers.auspicioushelper/ChannelMathTri.description: Like the channel math controller, but as a trigger that attempts to run when entered.

placements.compiled_operations: Encoded compiled operations, gotten from the compiler website
placements.multi_type: Behavior to use when starting a script when the script is already running
placements.activation_cond: When to try to start scripts
placements.debug: Whether to print debug information to the current debugging view

triggers.auspicioushelper/ChannelPlayerT.name: Channel Player Trigger
triggers.auspicioushelper/ChannelPlayerT.description: Modifies a given channel when a player interacts with this trigger

placements.value: The value to use when modifying the channel
placements.op: The operation to use when modifying the channel
placements.action: What player action will trigger this
placements.only_once: If this should only trigger once
placements.advanced: Set channels in a more advanced way. Given a list of channels to set/expression for value pairs such as  'a:3,b:@c[*2]' which sets channel a to 3 and channel b to twice the value of channel c. If using a channel in an expression, it must be prepended with @. If using a number, no prefix is needed.
placements.everywhere: Make the trigger cover the whole room

triggers.auspicioushelper/ConditionalStr.name: Conditional Strawberry Collection Trigger
triggers.auspicioushelper/ConditionalStr.description: Forces the collection of a specific strawberry

strawberry_id: Conditional strawberries with this strawberry name will be collected here
placements.playerOnSafeGround: Player must be on safe ground to collect the berry

triggers.auspicioushelper/DreamTransitio.description: Enable room transitions while in the dream state.

placements.assistSmuggle: If this trigger is inside a template, will allow the player to enter the template dreamblock slightly before touching it if having just picked up a holdable for a smuggle. Kinda jank and boutique, not reccomended unless you know exactly what you are doing.
placements.prioTemplateDreamblocks: When inside this trigger, will always enter template dreamblocks that are flush with a wall that would otherwise stop the player.

triggers.auspicioushelper/HoldableReleas.name: Release Holdable Trigger
triggers.auspicioushelper/HoldableReleas.description: Set holdable timer to 0, allowing immediate release

placements.force_throw: Whether the player should throw the item or just drop it
placements.only_once: If this should only trigger once

triggers.auspicioushelper/leniencything.description: Make movement more natural around detailed solid shapes.

placements.staticSlip: How wide a ledge (in pixels) the player will slip off when standing still
placements.fallingSlip: How wide a ledge (in pixels) the player will slip off when falling onto it
placements.maxGroundedStep: The largest vertical step the player will walk up without collision
placements.maxStepSlope: The maximum slope of the grounded step that can be taken
placements.neededFallDist: The amount the player must be able to fall in order to trigger slips
placements.snapDownAmount: The maximum distance (in pixels) to snap the player down when walking on a smooth surface that lowers by some small number of pixels
placements.alwaysForceSlip: Force the player to slip even when they are holding directionally towards the wall
placements.onlyWhenInside: Only apply movement patches while the player is inside this trigger
placements.setOnAwake: Apply these settings on room load

triggers.auspicioushelper/LiftspeedTrigg.description: Trigger that affects liftspeed and multiboost for more consistency when the player is inside

placements.dontGiveLiftspeed: Disable the player from getting liftspeed when inside
placements.disableMultiboost: Consume liftspeed whenever it is used, disabling multiboosts
placements.gracetimeMultiplier: Multiplier to apply to the length of time for which liftspeed can be used after being granted
placements.speedMultiplier: Multiplier to apply to any liftspeed given to a player while active
placements.coverRoom: Make the trigger cover the whole room

triggers.auspicioushelper/PersistentChan.description: A change respawn trigger whose assignment will not be overwritten on room transition. Must enter a normal change respawn trigger to break the persistance and restore normal transition-respawn behavior

triggers.auspicioushelper/RedbubbleSpeed.description: Change the speed of redbubbles used inside this trigger

placements.newSpeed: The new speed that the player should have when using a redbubble in this trigger

triggers.auspicioushelper/triggerparentt.description: Used in templates. When activated, will trigger its parent template

triggers.auspicioushelper/Downtrans.description: Override the room's 'disable down transition' metadata setting while inside

placements.disabled: Whether down transitions are disabled in this trigger.
